# HwDeactivate

**Instance Method**

Closes the communication channel to the device.

## Declaration

```swift
virtual kern_return_t HwDeactivate();
```

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/DriverKit/kIOReturnSuccess] on success, or another value if an error occurs. See [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/DriverKit/error-codes].

## Discussion

Override this method and use it to close the connection to your device’s hardware. Always call the `super` version of the method at the end of your implementation.

## Activating and Deactivating the Service

- **HwActivate**: Opens the communication channel to the device.
